title: Garlicky Crisp Vietnamese Garlic Pho
description: This one-pot dish combines the flavors of Vietnam with a garlicky kick and a crunchy texture.

ingredients.name: garlic
ingredients.notes: use 3 cloves for the oil, 3 for the broth

ingredients.name: lemongrass
ingredients.notes: bruise them with a spoon before cooking

ingredients.name: coconut oil
ingredients.notes: use for frying the garlic and onions

instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of coconut oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add 3 cloves of garlic and fry until crispy, about 2 minutes.
Remove the garlic from the pot and set aside.
Add the remaining garlic, onion salt, and black peppercorns to the pot and stir for 1 minute.
Add the lemongrass, ginger, and beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer for 10 minutes.
Add the rice noodles to the pot and cook until they're tender, about 5 minutes.
Divide the noodles among bowls and top with the crispy garlic, fried in the remaining coconut oil.
Season with additional onion salt and black pepper to taste.
Garnish with chopped scallions and fresh cilantro, if desired.
